name: Poorna Shadjam

sources.label: Dr. M. Radhakrishnan — Rare Raga Series: Poornashadjam

notes: Janya of Natabhairavi (20th melakarta); oudava-shadava raga (5 notes ascending, 6 descending); ārohana S R2 G2 M1 N2 N2 S, avarohana S N2 P M1 G2 R2 S; rare raga popularised by the Tyagaraja school; principal compositions are Tyagaraja's 'Śrī māninī manōhara' and 'Lavanya Rāma'
